csharp-discovery.title: 1. C# Discovery
csharp-discovery.objective: Discover converted module controllers, routes, views, services, repositories, SQL, and tables.

csharp-logic-understanding.title: 2. C# Logic Understanding
csharp-logic-understanding.objective: Use AI to explain workflow branches, validations, and DB touchpoints in the converted C# module.

java-discovery.title: 3. Java Discovery
java-discovery.objective: Locate legacy Java/JSP module files strictly anchored to C# discovery evidence.

java-logic-understanding.title: 4. Java Logic Understanding
java-logic-understanding.objective: Use AI to explain expected legacy behavior and business workflow outcomes.

diagram-generation.title: 5. Diagram Generation
diagram-generation.objective: Generate Mermaid + Excalidraw + preview image artifacts for C# and Java workflows.

functional-parity-and-sql-table-comparis.title: 6. Functional Parity + SQL/Table
functional-parity-and-sql-table-comparis.objective: Compare logic and data usage between legacy and converted modules and flag behavior drift.
functional-parity-and-sql-table-comparis.inputType: csharp + java logic and sql/table artifacts

ai-test-generation.title: 7. AI Test Generation
ai-test-generation.objective: Generate workflow-specific unit, integration, playwright, and edge tests.

test-execution.title: 8. Test Execution
test-execution.objective: Execute generated tests and capture logs, failures, console, network, and screenshots.
test-execution.outputType: execution logs + result summaries + evidence artifacts

clean-architecture-and-findings.title: 9. Clean Architecture + Findings
clean-architecture-and-findings.objective: Assess C# architecture and synthesize findings/recommendations across the full run.

pipeline-vanity-check.title: 10. Pipeline Vanity Check
pipeline-vanity-check.objective: Verify stage completeness, required evidence presence, and final recommendation.
